$schema_note: Per-box engine configuration TEMPLATE. install.sh / provision-anthology-client.sh resolve every <CLIENT_*> and <LABEL:*> slot per box as the node user. Credentials appear by LABEL only, never by value. The client-facing platform name is Convert and Flow in every surface. Nothing Anthropic ships in this file.

engine.model_map_ref: config/model-map.template.json (resolved to model-map.json per box by preflight.sh)

intake.forms_base_note: The minted author-intake link is the Convert and Flow (GHL/LeadConnector) HOSTED-form URL <forms_base_url>/widget/form/<universal_intake_form_id>?anthology_id=<minted>, built by scripts/anthology_book.py (the Book ID rides the ONE query param anthology_id onto the form's hidden anthology_id field). Both knobs default to FLEET-WIDE, non-client values baked in anthology_book.py — the shared LeadConnector hosted-form domain and the ONE universal author-intake form id — so a fresh box already emits the live link. These two OVERRIDE slots (NULL here) let a box repoint the base and/or form id per box (or pass --forms-base / --intake-form-id); NULL means use the built-in fleet default. G3: the query key is EXACTLY anthology_id, never anthology_active_id (that is the contact custom field the delivery writer stamps).
intake.tenant_check: payload location must equal the anthology registry Convert and Flow Location binding; a mismatch lands in Exceptions (tenant_mismatch), never a guess
intake.keying: contact_id plus anthology_id composite; never email; unroutable submissions land in the exceptions queue with the raw payload and a typed reason

delivery.drive_root_note: The PER-CLIENT delivery root: BlackCEO provisions ONE Google Shared Drive per client inside BlackCEO's own Workspace, and this box points at its OWN Shared-Drive root, resolved per box from the GOOGLE_DRIVE_ROOT_FOLDER label (never one shared operator root, so no client tree co-mingles with another's). drive_adapter.load_root_folder_id resolves arg > GOOGLE_DRIVE_ROOT_FOLDER env > this slot, and REFUSES an unresolved slot so a box that never set the label fails loudly. drive-tree-provision.py verifies the root at preflight and NEVER creates a new root (BlackCEO provisions the Shared Drive out of band). Tree below it: Producer, then Anthology, then Participant. Per-document sharing is EDIT on the co-author's own Doc and VIEW on PDFs/images; the root itself is never anyone-can-read.

drive_broker.mode_note: FLEET delivery model: the n8n Drive CREDENTIAL BROKER. Trevor's Google service-account key lives ONLY inside n8n (his n8n VPS main.blackceoautomations.com); a client box holds NO Google key -- only this webhook URL plus a low-privilege shared token (label N8N_DRIVE_WEBHOOK_TOKEN). When configured, drive_adapter.provision_book_tree POSTs the PRIVILEGED per-book folder-tree creation + producer editor share to n8n (action create_book_tree) and uses the returned folder ids; a compromised client box cannot leak Google creds because they were never there. When NOT configured, the box falls back to the local service account -- the ONLY box that legitimately holds the SA key is the operator's OWN box. Selection is per box: broker if BOTH url + token resolve, else local SA. Enforced by caf_credential_gate (EITHER the broker pair OR the SA trio per box) and drive_adapter.broker_configured.
drive_broker.webhook_url_note: The n8n Anthology Drive Broker webhook, e.g. https://main.blackceoautomations.com/webhook/anthology-drive. Resolved per box from the N8N_DRIVE_WEBHOOK_URL env or this slot; an unresolved slot keeps the box in local-SA mode. NOT a secret.
drive_broker.pending_note: The per-Doc ops are designed extension points, stubbed not faked. Until they are brokered, a pure client box can mint the per-book tree through the broker but the per-Doc operations still require the operator's OWN box (local SA). See MASTERDOC floor #10.

registry_defaults.pipeline_binding_note: GoHighLevel exposes no API to create a pipeline -- pipelines are UI-only. The standard Anthology pipeline must pre-exist in the CLIENT's own Convert and Flow account (shipped in the snapshot, or hand-built once in the UI); onboarding FINDS it BY EXACT NAME and BINDS to it through the CLIENT's OWN private integration token, STOPPING setup with AF-AE-PIPELINE-UI-CREATE if it is absent. Binding to a different pre-existing pipeline via an explicit override is never the default.
registry_defaults.caf_stage_map: per-anthology; drives the per-gate Convert and Flow pipeline-stage update; NEVER hardcoded

nudge_policy.all_other_repeats: manual via the board re-send button, rate-limited
nudge_policy.recipient_rule: ALWAYS resolved from the ledger row for the given contact_id (participant gates) or the producer record (producer gates); NO literal recipient exists anywhere in the engine
nudge_policy.silence_doctrine: The engine sends NOTHING else to any client, ever. Operator surfaces are verbose; client surfaces are silent.

hold_queue_policy.credit_out: durable HOLD with full state; ONE deduped founder Telegram alert through the OpenClaw gateway; the daily tick retries the chain and resumes from the exact cursor
hold_queue_policy.callback_lost: bounded re-poll, then hold plus alert
hold_queue_policy.gate_wait: NO timeout exists; the ledger holds the cursor for weeks or months at zero cost; 7-day stuck highlighting plus ONE deduped auto re-nudge
hold_queue_policy.strike_out: 3 internal QC attempts per deliverable, then HOLD plus a single deduped founder alert carrying the failing checks and the best draft; standards never relaxed

gates.participant_token_scope: single-gate-scoped, HMAC over participant_key + gate id + expiry; expires on gate closure; foreign, expired, and replayed tokens are refused
gates.both_door_rule: the emailed nudge deep link (participant) and the board card view (producer) hit the SAME endpoint and the SAME anthology_state.py subcommand; logic lives in ONE place

board.auth: HMAC (x-webhook-signature over WEBHOOK_SECRET) plus Bearer (MC_API_TOKEN); Skill 32's existing pair, reused never duplicated
board.fail_soft: board unreachability NEVER blocks the pipeline; the ledger remains the truth and the card reconciles on the daily tick
board.status_mapping: card status mirrors Participants.stage_cursor; producer-facing deliverables land the card in the review column (the chapter-approval queue); ONLY the independent QC scorer at or above 8.5 promotes review to done; the engine never self-promotes
board.department_seed: the Anthology department is seeded via Skill 32 add-department.sh (POST /api/departments create:true) during provisioning, idempotent and verified by reading the department back

cron.daily_tick: one cron entry: smoke test (balance endpoints only, at or under one cent), hold-queue aging, mirror reconcile, stuck-gate re-nudge policy
cron.no_heartbeat: NO heartbeat cron ever; guard-cron-inventory.py proves exactly the one daily tick and that churn leaves zero recurring jobs

credential_labels.note: Resolved SET or NOT SET only, never by value, across all three client env stores (live process env first). See PRD Section 14.
credential_labels.required_note: DELIVERY CREDENTIALS ARE EITHER/OR PER BOX (caf_credential_gate.py google_delivery_presence). n8n-BROKER MODE (fleet client box): the box holds NO Google key -- only N8N_DRIVE_WEBHOOK_URL + N8N_DRIVE_WEBHOOK_TOKEN (both required; a half-configured broker FAILS loudly, exit 2). LOCAL-SA MODE (the operator's OWN box): the three GOOGLE_* levers below are required instead -- GOOGLE_SA_KEY_FILE (the BlackCEO-owned delivery service-account key path), GOOGLE_IMPERSONATE_USER (the BlackCEO Workspace user the SA impersonates), and GOOGLE_DRIVE_ROOT_FOLDER (this client's OWN BlackCEO-hosted Shared-Drive root). A box missing its mode's levers FAILS provisioning loudly (exit 2) instead of silently no-op'ing delivery. The three GOOGLE_* levers therefore appear in `required` for the operator local-SA box; a client box satisfies delivery via the broker pair (in `optional`) and holds none of them. Confirmed SET or NOT SET by label only; the SA key contents and the broker token value are never read or printed.
credential_labels.optional_note: N8N_DRIVE_WEBHOOK_URL + N8N_DRIVE_WEBHOOK_TOKEN are the n8n Drive credential-broker pair for a FLEET CLIENT BOX. They are `optional` at the schema level because they are mutually exclusive with the GOOGLE_* delivery trio (a client box sets the broker pair and NONE of the GOOGLE_* levers; the operator's own box sets the GOOGLE_* trio and no broker). The either/or is enforced at runtime by caf_credential_gate.py, not by this static list. N8N_DRIVE_WEBHOOK_TOKEN is a secret (SET/NOT-SET only); N8N_DRIVE_WEBHOOK_URL is not.
